title: Unusual Australian Coconut Mousse
description: A cultured, glassy-jelly dessert that blends coconut cream, star anise, and pickled cucumber for a uniquely adventurous Australian flavor. It is sugar‑free, vegan, and ready in under an hour plus chilling time.
instructions: Combine coconut milk, coconut cream, vanilla, sweetener, and salt in a saucepan and heat to 75°C while stirring until the sweetener dissolves.
Remove the pan from heat and allow the mixture to cool to 40°C, then strain through a fine sieve to remove the star anise.
Whisk the gelatin powder into the hot water until fully dissolved, then add this gelatin blend to the coconut mixture and stir until fully incorporated.
Gently fold in the plain coconut yogurt until the mixture is evenly blended and smooth.
Pour the mousse mixture into individual serving glasses or a shallow dish.
Refrigerate the glasses for at least 240 minutes until the mousse has set into a glassy jelly.
Serve chilled, optionally garnish with a small piece of nuka‑pickle or a pinch of ground star anise.
Store any leftovers in the refrigerator for up to 48 hours.
